originalTitle: Cathie Wood sells $12 million in surging stock
summary: Veteran investor Cathie Wood once again executed one of the hottest trades on Wall Street when she trimmed her holdings in a surging crypto stock to buy a top defense stock. On May 29, Wood's investment firm ARK Invest sold 144,218 shares of Robinhood Markets (Nasdaq: HOOD). Founded by Stanford ...

chineseTitle: Cathie Wood 出售价值 1200 万美元的飙升股票
chineseSummary: 资深投资者凯西·伍德（Cathie Wood）再次执行了华尔街最热门的交易之一，她减持了一只飙升的加密货币股票，购买了一只顶级国防股票。 5月29日，伍德的投资公司ARK Invest出售了144,218股Robinhood Markets（纳斯达克股票代码：HOOD）股票。由斯坦福大学创立...

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
